examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-policies id=6033f7a1-e66c-4aef-9c7d-ed454457d071 pageNumber=2 pageSize=75
Raw Output
{
"date_added":"2018-03-05T12:29:02",
"date_modified":"2018-03-05T12:29:02",
"device_count":0,
name: cylance-protect-get-policies

outputs.description: Date and time (in UTC) when the Console policy resource was first created CylanceProtect.Policies.DateModified Date and time (in UTC) when the Console policy resource was last modified
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Policies.DateAdded

outputs.description: Number of devices assigned to this policy CylanceProtect.Policies.Id Unique ID for the policy resource
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Policies.DeviceCount

outputs.description: Policy name CylanceProtect.Policies.ZoneCount Number of zones assigned to this policy
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Policies.Name
